name: 渣男下場（被流放北極）
description: 前男友從開場的趾高氣揚到最終被扔進火山/流放北極，完成了完整的因果報應弧線。觀眾積蓄的憤怒得到最大程度的釋放。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: Someone send this scum off to the North Pole. / Brandt. Throw him in a volcano. / Yes, sir. There's no way. I bet that North Pole.
